title: HOMEXCEL Microfibre Cloth,12 Pack Cleaning Rag,Microfibre Cleaning Cloths Towels with 4 Color Assorted,29 x 29 cm (Green/Blue/Yellow/Pink)
features: Efficient Cleaning: Utilize these microfibre cleaning cloths, sized perfectly at 29 X 29cm, for a variety of surfaces including worktops, kitchens, windows, cars, and delicate surfaces. Achieve streak-free and pristine results effortlessly with just water or cleaner.

Lint-Free & Gentle: Crafted from 87% Polyester and 13% Polyamide, these soft cleaning rags guarantee a lint-free experience. Their gentle touch ensures they won't scratch or harm any surfaces, allowing you to clean with confidence.

Eco-Friendly & Long-lasting: Reduce your environmental footprint by opting for these reusable cleaning towels. With reinforced edges, they're built to withstand hundreds of uses without easily wearing out, making them a sustainable alternative to disposable paper towels.

Versatile & Convenient Cleaning: Beyond general cleaning, these cloths are ideal for various tasks including car detailing, electronics, eyeglasses, screens, and more. After use, simply rinse or toss them in the washing machine for hassle-free cleaning.

Gift-Worthy & Reliable Service: Enhance your cleaning arsenal with our soft and highly absorbent microfiber towels. Experience a new level of clean and comfort with HOMEXCEL microfiber cleaning cloths, backed by our worry-free service.
description: Product Description Microfibre Cloth Made of 87% Polyester and 13% Polyamide, this microfibre cloth is extremely soft and non-abrasive, the size is 29 CMX 29 CM. Colorful Cleaning Life The microfibre cloth comes in 4 colors: Green, Blue, Yellow, and Pink. We believe you would like your kitchen to be filled with rainbow-like colors. Support Machine Wash These towels are designed to withstand repeated cleaning and washing without falling apart or fraying. You can toss them directly into the laundry. Versatile Use Not only suitable for general cleaning tasks, but also great for cleaning car exteriors or interiors, electronics, eyeglasses, screens, and more.
